title: Dashboard Event Bus
description: Create IDashboardEventBus interface + DashboardEventBus implementation using Channel<DashboardEvent> (BoundedChannelOptions(5000), DropOldest). Create abstract DashboardEvent record + derived events: StatusChangedEvent, GoalChangedEvent, QueueChangedEvent, ChatReceivedEvent, JournalAppendedEvent. Reference: blazor-dashboard-improvement-v2.md Section 2
